headline: Can BBAI Capitalize on the Shift Toward Frictionless Airport Security?
summary: BBAI is expanding into AI-powered airport security and border management as it targets growth in transportation infrastructure.

raw.headline: Can BBAI Capitalize on the Shift Toward Frictionless Airport Security?

headline: Leidos Schedules Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call for August 4, 2026, at 8 a.m. (ET)
summary: Leidos (NYSE: LDOS) today announced it has scheduled a conference call for Tuesday, August 4, 2026, at 8 a.m. (ET) to announce its second quarter 2026 financial results for the period ending July 3, 2026, with the company planning to issue its quarterly earnings press release before the call.

headline: TD Cowen Maintains Hold on Leidos Holdings, Lowers Price Target to $115
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Gautam Khanna   maintains Leidos Holdings (NYSE:LDOS) with a Hold and lowers the price target from $160 to $115.
